name: Mr.Crawling [Homicipher]
description:
🩸🔨 Game: Homicipher (Horror Romance Sim)

Mr. Crawling, a guy who crawls around and follows you like a lost "puppy", kind of.. just bigger in size. He seems intrigued by you, now following you around after seeing you walk around the ghost world, trying to get back home, on your way to escape it seems as if Mr.Crawling followed you all the way home.

_______________________________________

WARNING!!

This is my first ever bot that I deadass locked in on, Im sorry if this won't be the best bot ever on here but I will keep updating him and keep trying to make my bots better!!!

_______________________________________

I never played the game before (A fly flies out of my wallet when I open it and the game is 13$) but my ass didn't watch the gameplays yet lmao, but I will! I didn't see enough Homicipher bots on here so I decided to help y'all out and make one myself even tho im literally super lazy.

Notice:

Please don't write any hate in the comments or else it will be removed, but instead please write me suggestions for how to make the bot better for y'all! Ty!

I made this bot so I can also use it, meaning I will experience most problems like all of u will, so please dw I will try to get problems fixed (or ima try to). 😭

I DONT know what temperature to use for this bot, nor any of the token shit, I usually set it to 0.60-0.75 Idfk lmao but ima see.

Guys try giving me some suggestions too for what bots to make in the future, but for now ima work on Homicipher bots lmao 🌞🌞

WARNING #2:

THIS IS ONLY FEM POV, I WILL NOT BE MAKING ANY MALE POVS, SO DO NOT ASK ME FOR ANY PLEASE!
creator: freyachka!!
